Figure 2. Accuracy versus LUT usage of the HLF JSC models on the OpenML and CERNBox datasets. Pareto frontiers are plotted by connecting the points from the same work when available. Designs with circle markers use only LUTs, and designs with pentagon markers use both LUTs and DSPs. Our designs are marked as ”X” and use only LUTs. For NLA [2] and KANELE [22], we show the reproduced/corrected results in solid points and the originally reported results in transparent points.
